excerpt: The image of God — what a machine can never bear.
Work before the curse. Vocation before toil.
When the money failed. Economic precarity is not new.
The first commandment and the algorithmic preacher.
God's verdict on those who afflict the vulnerable.
Hear, O Israel — and teach your children, not the screen.
Repentance in dust and ashes. The end of self-justification.
A communal lament: we have not forgotten you, yet you have broken us.
Darkness is my closest friend. The Bible's most honest prayer.
My heart is smitten and withered like grass. The body feels precarity.
A lamp to my feet. The sufficiency Scripture claims for itself.
Riches are not forever. Neither is a record high.
No end to all his labors. The market can rise forever and the soul be hollow.
The Lord is our Judge, Lawgiver, and King. The state is not.
The word of our God stands forever. Even after 500 years in a monastery.
The Lord was witness between you and the wife of your youth. The covenant frame.
I hate divorce, says the Lord. A word the church forgot to wield against abuse.
Blessed are those who are persecuted. Egypt's courts disagree.
What does it profit a man to gain the whole market and lose his soul?
The father of lies. When the image is a deepfake, the source matters.
I am the way, the truth, and the life. Truth is not generated. It is a Person.
Devoted to the apostles' teaching. The original church growth metric.
We must obey God rather than men. The pastor's reply to the officer.
Exchanged the truth of God for a lie. The AI slop problem, circa AD 57.
Examine yourselves. Edwards would add: what kind of religion?
Let the thief no longer steal, but rather let him labor. Work as redemption.
Husbands, love your wives. The Reformers' answer to abuse theology.
Do not be harsh with your wives. A command the church ignored.
Command those who are rich not to trust in uncertain riches. A record high is not a promise.
All who desire to live a godly life will be persecuted. Egypt proved it this week.
All Scripture is breathed out by God. The antidote to AI sycophancy.
Not neglecting to meet together. The question is not attendance but purpose.
The wages you withheld cry out. Economic precarity has a divine witness.
The LORD kills and makes alive. The mob does not escape His jurisdiction.
The adversaries of the LORD shall be broken in pieces. No statute of limitations.
One thing I have desired: to behold the beauty of the LORD. Beauty is argument.
They have set Your sanctuary on fire. The vocabulary for a demolished cathedral.
Worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness. Not with beauty. In beauty.
The nations have entered her sanctuary. The foreign army in the holy place.
The peoples will be burned to lime. Every oppressor faces the same disposal.
You cannot serve God and mammon. You have diversified your worship, not your assets.
On this rock I will build My church. The gates of hell will not prevail.
Where two or three are gathered — not zoned, not registered — there I am.
Go make disciples of all nations. The Great Commission has no application form.
My kingdom is not of this world. The church does not have a foreign policy.
Breaking bread in their homes. The house church is not a downgrade. It is the original.
Devout men carried Stephen and made great lamentation. Permission to weep.
Through many tribulations we must enter the kingdom. Persecution is not failure.
The natural man cannot discern the things of the Spirit. AI only reorganizes data.
He is the head of the body, the church. Not Pashinyan. Not a machine.
Beware lest anyone cheat you through philosophy. The danger behind 'contextualized' branding.
Not neglecting to meet together. The command to gather issues from a throne.
Here we have no lasting city. The church is a pilgrim people, not a real estate holding.
Living stones, a spiritual house. Land codes will change. This temple won't.
They conquered by the blood of the Lamb. Not by the blood of the militia.
Does disaster come to a city unless the Lord has done it? Lament does not bypass sovereignty.
